name: Raw Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes well and grate them into a bowl without peeling.
2. Beat the yolks until light and lemon-colored.
3. Add the grated potatoes, salt, sugar, flour, and baking powder to the beaten yolks. Mix well.
4. Beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
5. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the potato mixture.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased griddle or skillet to form 3-inch cakes.
7. Fry the pancakes until browned on both sides and golden, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Keep the cooked pancakes warm in a preheated oven set to 300°F (150°C).
9. Serve hot.
